title: Weekly Dinner Menu Planner Template
summary: Template-first module for weekly dinner menu planning without custom glue code.
selection_rule: Prefer this module when the task is a planning workflow with one-click export and no account/login requirements.

entries.title: Weekly Dinner Menu Planner Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, set household size and weekly budget, then generate a plan and download the CSV artifact.
entries.smoke_test: Run Generate weekly plan and check that a table renders with at least five rows, then download CSV and confirm columns: day, meal, prep_minutes, estimated_cost_usd.
entries.proof_signal: Deterministic local behavior plus versioned manifest and event hooks for completion, save/install intent, and paid CTA click.
entries.fallback: Use the official public planning template sources if spreadsheet automation rules are different in your environment.

fallback: If your workflow requires grocery category logic, nutrition scoring, or budget optimization, use a dedicated planning app for deeper automation.
